about.title: Acerca de Aurora
about.subtitle: Tu mercado de confianza para productos premium
about.intro: Fundada en 2026, Aurora se ha convertido en uno de los mercados en línea más confiables, conectando clientes con vendedores verificados de todo el mundo. Nuestra misión es hacer que los productos de calidad sean accesibles para todos mientras garantizamos una experiencia de compra segura y sin complicaciones.
about.qualityFirstDesc: Cada producto está verificado por autenticidad y calidad
about.customerFocusDesc: Tu satisfacción es nuestra máxima prioridad
about.trustSecurityDesc: Transacciones seguras y protección de datos

contact.title: Contáctanos
contact.subtitle: Nos encantaría saber de ti. Ponte en contacto con nuestro equipo.
contact.formNote: Completa el formulario a continuación y nos pondremos en contacto contigo lo antes posible.
contact.name: Nombre
contact.subject: Asunto
contact.messageSent: ¡Mensaje enviado! Nos pondremos en contacto contigo pronto.

help.title: Centro de ayuda
help.subtitle: Encuentra respuestas a preguntas frecuentes y obtén soporte
help.trackOrderA: Puedes rastrear tu pedido desde tu página de Pedidos. Haz clic en cualquier pedido para ver información detallada de seguimiento.
help.shippingTimeA: El envío estándar tarda 5-7 días hábiles. El envío exprés está disponible para entrega en 2-3 días hábiles.
help.internationalShipA: Sí, enviamos a la mayoría de los países del mundo. Los tiempos de envío internacional varían según el destino.
help.paymentMethodsA: Aceptamos todas las principales tarjetas de crédito, PayPal y otros métodos de pago seguros.
help.paymentSecureA: Sí, todos los pagos se procesan a través de conexiones seguras y encriptadas.
help.installmentsA: Sí, ofrecemos planes de pago a plazos a través de nuestros socios de pago para compras elegibles.
help.returnPolicyA: Ofrecemos una política de devolución de 30 días para la mayoría de los artículos. Los productos deben estar en su estado original.
help.howReturnA: Ve a tu página de Pedidos, selecciona el artículo y haz clic en "Devolver artículo". Sigue las instrucciones para imprimir una etiqueta de devolución.
help.refundTimeA: Los reembolsos se procesan dentro de 5-7 días hábiles después de recibir tu devolución.
help.contactSupportA: Puedes contactarnos por correo electrónico, teléfono o el sistema de mensajería en tu cuenta.
help.changeEmailA: Sí, ve a Configuración > Cuenta para actualizar tu correo electrónico.
help.deleteAccountA: Contacta a nuestro equipo de soporte para solicitar la eliminación de la cuenta. Ten en cuenta que esta acción es permanente.
help.ourTeamHelp: Nuestro equipo de soporte está aquí para ayudarte con cualquier pregunta.

factoryWelcome.heroSubtitle: Join Aurora's manufacturing network. Manage production, connect with global buyers, and scale your operations with enterprise-grade tools.

benefits.title: Why Choose Aurora for Your Factory
benefits.heading: Everything You Need to Scale Production
benefits.description: From order management to quality control, Aurora provides the complete toolkit for modern manufacturers.

globalReach.title: Connect with Global Buyers
globalReach.description: Reach manufacturers, wholesalers, and buyers from over 50+ countries worldwide.

analytics.title: Advanced Analytics
analytics.description: Track production performance, sales trends, and market demand with real-time dashboards.

qualityControl.title: Quality Control
qualityControl.description: Built-in QC workflows ensure every batch meets standards before shipment.

production.title: Production Management
production.description: Manage orders, timelines, and capacity all in one centralized platform.

efficiency.title: Streamlined Operations
efficiency.description: Automate workflows, reduce manual overhead, and scale production effortlessly.

partnerships.title: Build Partnerships
partnerships.description: Connect with trusted suppliers, middlemen, and delivery partners for seamless logistics.

steps.title: Getting Started
steps.heading: Three Steps to Go Live
steps.description: Set up your factory presence on Aurora in minutes, not weeks.

register.title: Register Your Factory
register.description: Create your account and set up your factory profile with capabilities and certifications.

list.title: List Your Products
list.description: Add your product catalog with pricing, MOQs, and production lead times.

grow.title: Grow & Scale
grow.description: Receive orders, manage production, and expand your business globally.

analytics.title: Real-Time Production Analytics
analytics.description: Monitor production metrics, track order fulfillment, and optimize capacity utilization with live dashboards and automated reports.

marketplace.title: Global Marketplace Access
marketplace.description: Showcase your capabilities to thousands of buyers worldwide. Get discovered through smart matching and verified supplier profiles.

finalCta.title: Start Manufacturing Smarter Today
finalCta.description: Join hundreds of factories already using Aurora to streamline operations, reach new markets, and grow their business globally.

hero.title: Bridge Deals,
hero.subtitle: Connect buyers with sellers, facilitate transactions, and earn commissions on every successful deal. Join Aurora's growing network of professional middlemen.

benefits.title: Why Become a Middleman?
benefits.heading: Everything You Need to Succeed
benefits.subheading: Our platform provides all the tools and support you need to build a thriving middleman business.

earnCommission.title: Earn Commission on Every Deal
earnCommission.desc: Get paid for successfully connecting buyers with sellers. Our transparent commission system ensures you're rewarded for every connection.

connect.title: Connect Buyers & Sellers
connect.desc: Build your network by bringing together businesses that complement each other. Create lasting partnerships and grow your influence.

track.title: Track Your Earnings
track.desc: Real-time analytics dashboard shows your commissions, pending deals, and growth metrics. Never wonder where your money is.

secure.title: Secure & Transparent
secure.desc: All transactions are protected and tracked. Get paid automatically when deals close with our escrow-based system.

global.title: Global Marketplace
global.desc: Access buyers and sellers from around the world. No geographical limits - connect businesses across borders.

fast.title: Fast Deal Closure
fast.desc: Our streamlined process helps deals close faster. Average deal closure time is just 48 hours.

1.title: Sign Up & Get Verified
1.desc: Create your middleman account and complete the verification process. It only takes a few minutes.

2.title: Find Opportunities
2.desc: Browse buyer requests and seller offerings. Identify matching opportunities where you can add value.

3.title: Connect & Negotiate
3.desc: Introduce buyers to sellers, facilitate negotiations, and help both parties reach an agreement.

4.title: Earn Commission
4.desc: Once the deal closes, your commission is automatically calculated and paid out. Simple and transparent.

howItWorks.title: How It Works
howItWorks.heading: Start Earning in 4 Simple Steps
howItWorks.subheading: Our streamlined process makes it easy to get started and start earning commissions.

testimonial.content: The commission system is transparent and fair. I've built a sustainable income connecting buyers and sellers across multiple industries. Aurora gave me the tools to turn my network into a real business.
testimonial.name: Maria Garcia

finalCta.heading: Ready to Start Connecting?
finalCta.subheading: Join thousands of middlemen already earning commissions on Aurora. Create your account today and start building your network.
